description_long: This is a modern, tactical rifle with a matte blue-gray finish and black accents, featuring a robust, angular receiver and a prominent, cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine, shown separately, and a vertical foregrip for enhanced control during firing. The stock is integrated into the body in a bullpup configuration, placing the magazine and action behind the trigger for a compact profile. The upper receiver has a rail system for mounting optics or accessories, and the rifle is fitted with iron sights. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details suggesting durability and modularity. The materials appear to be primarily metal and polymer, typical for contemporary urban firearms.
description: A compact, blue-gray bullpup rifle with a suppressor, detachable box magazine, and tactical rail system. Features a vertical foregrip and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suppressor's circular opening and the alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the detachable box magazine, vertical foregrip, and detailed receiver components.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's bullpup configuration and the top rail, with the magazine visible below.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the magazine, trigger area, and the overall compactness of the bullpup design.
